DP.023.0000:
Do you have a Pokétch?\f
There’s a girl’s model and a boy’s
model, each in different colors.
DP.023.0001:
My husband’s the president.\f
We started out in a small workshop
where he made what he liked.\f
Now we’re making something that makes
the world happy. Imagine that!
DP.023.0002:
People everywhere make Pokétch apps.\f
You’ll be able to get new apps from
surprising sources.\f
The PCs here have guides on the
various Pokétch apps.
DP.023.0003:
There are descriptions of Pokétch
apps.\f
DP.023.0004:
Which Pokétch app would
you like to read about?
DP.023.0005:
There are descriptions of Pokétch
apps.\f
DP.023.0006:
Which Pokétch app would
you like to read about?

There are descriptions of Pokétch
apps.\f

DP.023.0010:
Which Pokétch app would you like
to read about?
DP.023.0011:
The Digital Watch displays the
current time.\f
Don’t be late for meetings with
your friends!\f
DP.023.0012:
The Analog Watch displays the
current time.\f
The short hand indicates the hour,
and the long hand shows the minute!\f
DP.023.0013:
The Alarm Clock can be set to sound
every 24 hours.\f
Set the alarm time with the lower
button. The top button turns it on.\f
DP.023.0014:
The Stopwatch is used for measuring
time precisely.\f
How quickly can you zip through
the Cycling Road?\f
DP.023.0015:
The Kitchen Timer can count down from
up to 99 minutes, but not precisely.\f
Set the time with the center button,
then start the countdown.\f
DP.023.0016:
Use the monthly Calendar to make
a note of important dates.\f
Touch any date to change its color.
Touch it again to turn it back.\f
DP.023.0017:
The Calculator can handle up to
ten digits.\f
It’s perfect for figuring out math
questions that might pop up.\f
DP.023.0018:
The Pokémon List indicates the
statuses of your team’s Pokémon.\f
Touch them to hear their cries.
Their HP bar is also displayed.\f
DP.023.0019:
The Friendship Checker indicates how
friendly your Pokémon are to you.\f
Touch the screen. The Pokémon that
like you will come closer.\f
DP.023.0020:
The Day-Care Checker shows the
Pokémon you have in the Day Care.\f
Check and see how your Pokémon are
doing with the Day-Care Couple.\f
DP.023.0021:
The Matchup Checker tests the
attraction between Pokémon.\f
The greater the number of hearts,
the better likelihood of Eggs.\f
DP.023.0022:
The Pokémon History keeps track of
the Pokémon you have obtained.\f
It shows the last twelve kinds of
Pokémon you obtained.\f
DP.023.0023:
The Berry Searcher is a map that
shows the locations of Berries.\f
It indicates the presence of Berries
in areas you have already visited.\f
DP.023.0024:
The Memo Pad is useful for jotting
down a note, or just doodling.\f
There’s an eraser, too, just in case
you make a mistake.\f
DP.023.0025:
The Dot Artist lets you draw pictures
in a mosaic style.\f
Touching the same dot makes its
color turn darker.\f
DP.023.0026:
The Color Changer changes the
Pokétch’s display color.\f
Slide the switch to select one
of eight colors.\f
DP.023.0027:
The Marking Map lets you mark
intriguing locations.\f
Drag marks to places on the map
that you want to remember.\f
DP.023.0028:
The Roulette features a wheel
that can be written on.\f
Draw numbers, items, or whatever on
the wheel and give it a spin!\f
DP.023.0029:
The Coin Toss flips a coin that
comes up heads or tails.\f
If you can’t choose between two
choices, a coin toss might be handy.\f
DP.023.0030:
The Pedometer keeps a count of
the number of steps traveled.\f
It automatically counts steps.
Touch the button to reset it.\f
DP.023.0031:
The Dowsing Machine searches for
hidden or obscured items.\f
Touch the radar screen. If there is
an item nearby, it will respond.\f
DP.023.0032:
The Counter is used for counting
things one at a time.\f
Touch the button and count whatever
needs counting.\f
DP.023.0033:
The Trainer Counter tracks the
performance of the Poké Radar.\f
It shows how often you have met
the same kind of Pokémon in a row.\f
DP.023.0034:
The Link Searcher searches for
players on wireless communications.\f
Touch the screen to get a list of
people using wireless communications.\f
DP.023.0035:
The Move Tester checks how effective
moves are by type.\f
Switch the attacker and defender
types to see what is effective.\f
